key_facts: retention_in_days = 14 is already set — resource is compliant
terraform_action must be NONE — do NOT generate any Terraform for this finding
ingestion volume is low (0.25 GB/month) — S3 archival not warranted
368 untagged images accumulating — no lifecycle policy set
61.7 GB total; lifecycle reduces cost from $6.17 to ~$0.44/month
aws_ecr_lifecycle_policy must be a separate resource (not inline)
rules: expire untagged images after 1 day, cap tagged images at 30
data_loss_acknowledged = true — existing untagged images will be deleted

decision_summary.rationale: Log group already has 14-day retention policy matching compliance requirements.

/aws/lambda/user-auth.technical_explanation: The CloudWatch log group for Lambda function 'user-auth' already has a 14-day retention policy configured, which aligns with the organization's cost optimization standards. No additional configuration is required.

decision_summary.rationale: Adding lifecycle policy to clean up 368 untagged images will reduce storage costs by $5.73/month.

backend-service-ecr.technical_explanation: The ECR repository 'backend-service' has 368 untagged images (61.7 GB) with no lifecycle policy. Implementing a lifecycle policy to expire untagged images after 1 day and retain only the latest 30 tagged images will significantly reduce storage costs.

risks: Deleting untagged images may remove development/test images needed for debugging
Potential data loss if untagged images contain important historical data
risk_assessment.verification_steps:
1. Confirm with DevOps team that untagged images can be safely deleted
2. Verify CI/CD pipeline doesn't rely on untagged images
3. Check if any images are manually tagged but missing 'latest' tag

llm_response.group_summary: 1. The Lambda log group is already compliant with 14-day retention. 2. The ECR repository requires a lifecycle policy to clean up 368 untagged images, projected to save $5.73/month. Total potential savings: $5.73/month ($68.76/year). The ECR policy change requires manual verification due to data loss risks.

nl_quality.name: nl_quality
nl_quality.details: The report covers all key facts with correct figures and resource-specific detail; minor gaps are that the rationale doesn't explicitly mention why S3 archival was rejected for the low-volume log group, and data_loss_acknowledged is absent as a named field though the risk is described.

raw_output:
<think>
Okay, let's start by looking at the first resource, the CloudWatch log group for the Lambda function. The finding says it's already compliant with a retention of 14 days. The agent's decision is CLEAN, which means no action is needed. The Terraform code already sets retention_in_days to 14, so there's nothing to change here. The cost report shows a low monthly cost, but since it's already set correctly, the projected cost remains the same. No risks here, so the verdict should be OPTIMAL.

Next, the ECR repository. The finding indicates that there's no lifecycle policy, leading to a lot of untagged images. The agent suggests adding a lifecycle policy to save costs. The current Terraform doesn't have this policy. The proposed action is to create an aws_ecr_lifecycle_policy resource. The policy should expire untagged images after a day and keep a reasonable number of tagged images. The cost savings are significant, so the action is valid. However, I need to check if the policy is correctly structured. The Terraform block should include the repository name and the policy JSON. Also, since deleting images can cause data loss, data_loss_risk is true, and manual verification is needed. The agent's decision is correct, so the verdict is OPTIMAL, but the Terraform needs to be generated.
</think>

{
  "findings": {
    "/aws/lambda/user-auth": {
      "verdict": "OPTIMAL",
      "decision_summary": {
        "action": "NONE",
        "decided_by": "AGENT_VALIDATED",
        "rationale": "Log group already has 14-day retention policy matching compliance requirements."
      },
      "technical_explanation": "The CloudWatch log group for Lambda function 'user-auth' already has a 14-day retention policy configured, which aligns with the organization's cost optimization standards. No additional configuration is required.",
      "cost_report": {
        "waste_evidence": {
          "log_gb_per_month": 0.25,
          "retention_days": 14,
          "cost_per_month": 0.12
        },
        "current_monthly_cost": 0.12,
        "projected_monthly_cost": 0.12,
        "monthly_savings": 0.0,
        "annual_savings": 0.0
      },
      "risk_assessment": {
        "risks": [],
        "requires_manual_verification": false,
        "verification_steps": null
      },
      "data_loss_acknowledged": false,
      "terraform_action": "NONE",
      "terraform_block": null
    },
    "backend-service-ecr": {
      "verdict": "OPTIMAL",
      "decision_summary": {
        "action": "SET_LIFECYCLE",
        "decided_by": "AGENT_VALIDATED",
        "rationale": "Adding lifecycle policy to clean up 368 untagged images will reduce storage costs by $5.73/month."
      },
      "technical_explanation": "The ECR repository 'backend-service' has 368 untagged images (61.7 GB) with no lifecycle policy. Implementing a lifecycle policy to expire untagged images after 1 day and retain only the latest 30 tagged images will significantly reduce storage costs.",
      "cost_report": {
        "waste_evidence": {
          "untagged_images": 368,
          "total_size_gb": 61.7,
          "cost_per_month": 6.17,
          "estimated_savings_per_month": 5.73
        },
        "current_monthly_cost": 6.17,
        "projected_monthly_cost": 0.44,
        "monthly_savings": 5.73,
        "annual_savings": 68.76
      },
      "risk_assessment": {
        "risks": [
          "Deleting untagged images may remove development/test images needed for debugging",
          "Potential data loss if untagged images contain important historical data"
        ],
        "requires_manual_verification": true,
        "verification_steps": "1. Confirm with DevOps team that untagged images can be safely deleted\n2. Verify CI/CD pipeline doesn't rely on untagged images\n3. Check if any images are manually tagged but missing 'latest' tag"
      },
      "data_loss_acknowledged": true,
      "terraform_action": "LLM_GENERATED",
      "terraform_block": "resource \"aws_ecr_lifecycle_policy\" \"backend_service_policy\" {\n  repository = aws_ecr_repository.backend_service.name\n\n  policy = <<POLICY\n{\n  \"rules\": [\n    {\n      \"rulePriority\": 1,\n      \"description\": \"Expire untagged images after 1 day\",\n      \"selection\": {\n        \"tagStatus\": \"untagged\",\n        \"countType\": \"sinceImagePushed\",\n        \"countUnit\": \"days\",\n        \"countNumber\": 1\n      },\n      \"action\": {\n        \"type\": \"expire\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"rulePriority\": 2,\n      \"description\": \"Retain latest 30 tagged images\",\n      \"selection\": {\n        \"tagStatus\": \"tagged\",\n        \"tagPrefixList\": [\"v\"]\n      },\n      \"action\": {\n        \"type\": \"expire\",\n        \"parameters\": {\n          \"countType\": \"imageCountMoreThan\",\n          \"countNumber\": 30\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  ]\n}\nPOLICY\n\n  tags = {\n    FinOpsAction = \"SET_LIFECYCLE\"\n    FinOpsReviewed = \"true\"\n  }\n}\n\n# Add to existing ECR repository configuration\nresource \"aws_ecr_repository\" \"backend_service\" {\n  name                 = \"backend-service\"\n  image_tag_mutability = \"MUTABLE\"\n\n  image_scanning_configuration {\n    scan_on_push = true\n  }\n\n  tags = {\n    Name        = \"backend-service\"\n    Environment = \"production\"\n  }\n}"
    }
  },
  "group_summary": "1. The Lambda log group is already compliant with 14-day retention. 2. The ECR repository requires a lifecycle policy to clean up 368 untagged images, projected to save $5.73/month. Total potential savings: $5.73/month ($68.76/year). The ECR policy change requires manual verification due to data loss risks.",
  "group_cost_report": {
    "total_monthly_savings": 5.73,
    "total_annual_savings": 68.76,
    "findings_actioned": 1
  }
}
